default.summary: Hydrogen offtake demand varies by region. Check nearby refineries, ammonia/fertilizer plants, heavy industry, and DOE H2 hubs for potential buyers.

CA.summary: Strong demand: refining, ports, heavy transport, and industry. State H2 goals and LCFS drive offtake. LA basin and Central Valley industrial clusters.

TX.summary: Major demand hub: Gulf Coast refineries, petrochemicals, ammonia, and H2 pipelines. DOE H2Hub; strong industrial and export offtake potential.

NM.summary: Growing H2 interest; DOE H2Hub and regional industry. Refining and industrial offtake developing.

AZ.summary: Industrial and data center demand; heavy transport corridors. Regional offtake agreements emerging.

NV.summary: Industrial and logistics demand; Las Vegas and Reno corridors. Offtake market developing.

WA.summary: Refining (Puget Sound), aviation, and industry. Clean H2 offtake interest for maritime and heavy transport.

OR.summary: Industrial and logistics; Portland corridor. Regional offtake and ammonia interest.

WY.summary: Coal and industrial; ammonia and fertilizer potential. Smaller offtake market but growing.

UT.summary: Refining and industry along Wasatch Front. Regional H2 and ammonia offtake interest.

CO.summary: Front Range industry, refining, and transport. Growing clean H2 and ammonia offtake interest.

IA.summary: Fertilizer and ag industry; ammonia demand. Central location for Midwest offtake.

OK.summary: Refining and petrochemicals; Cushing and Gulf links. Strong industrial offtake potential.

KS.summary: Ag and fertilizer; ammonia demand. Regional industrial offtake.

IL.summary: Chicago industrial hub; refining, steel, and transport. Major Midwest offtake market.

NY.summary: Industrial and transport demand; Northeast corridor. Clean H2 for heavy industry and ports.

PA.summary: Manufacturing, refining, and industry. Ohio River and East Coast offtake potential.

OH.summary: DOE H2Hub; manufacturing, refining, and steel. Strong industrial offtake and ammonia demand.

FL.summary: Space coast, ports, and industry. Growing H2 for transport and industrial offtake.

LA.summary: Major demand: Gulf refineries, petrochemicals, ammonia, and H2 pipelines. DOE H2Hub; dense offtake corridor.

ND.summary: Fertilizer and ag; ammonia demand. Regional offtake and Midwest connections.

NE.summary: Ag and fertilizer; ammonia offtake. Regional industrial demand.

MT.summary: Refining and resource sector. Smaller offtake market; regional agreements.
